Risk changes: 600276 improved from weak hold to weak-to-strong watch after reclaiming MA20 intraday; 600210 slipped marginally below MA20 and remains below MA60; 600157 and 002195 stay no-add laggards.
A/B/C candidates: A=600276 only if MA20 hold and relative strength persist; B=300303 only on controlled pullback plus re-acceleration; C=510300 only as small ETF fallback near support.

Weak-to-strong rotation condition: sell/reduce a laggard only when the replacement has higher score, stronger sector logic, and does not raise portfolio concentration or stop-loss risk; do not rotate just to chase green candles.
